scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm --filter @workspace/music-player run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(fs.existsSync('dist')){fs.rmSync('dist', {recursive:true,force:true})}; fs.renameSync('artifacts/music-player/dist', 'dist')"
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
